title: 1st Menorca International Organ Festival
location: Iglesias de Sant Lluís, Maó (Santa Maria y del Carme) y Santuari del Toro (Es Mercadal)
description: First edition of the festival promoted by the Fundació Sintes-Grollero and coordinated by organist Tomeu Olives, with eight concerts between 3 July and 11 October 2026. It tours the island's historic organs in Sant Lluís, Maó (Santa Maria, home to its 1810 Kyburz organ, and the del Carme church) and the Es Mercadal sanctuary of El Toro, with international performers.
